subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath sent forth the Messengers, revealed the Books, and guided mankind unto the straight path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ارسل الرسل و انزل الکتب و هدی الناس الی سوآء الصراط و الصلوه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
